ValidationRule.description: Prevents reopening a Closed Won or Closed Lost opportunity unless System Administrator.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), NOT($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Closed Won'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Closed Lost') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Closed Opportunities cannot be reopened. Please contact your System Administrator.
